title: Planet Fitness stock plunges 30% after company slashes guidance, cancels planned price hikes
summary: Shares of Planet Fitness plunged Thursday after the fitness company slashed its guidance and canceled planned price hikes.

title: Inside India newsletter: Social media is reshaping the world's fastest-growing market for global brands
summary: Social media influencers are urging consumers to read labels and pushing traditional companies to make healthier products or risk being replaced by newer entrants.
